page: Microsoft Azure D128nls_v6 is a network-optimized virtual machine belonging to the Dnlv6 server family. It is built on the x86_64 architecture and features an Intel processor with 128 dedicated vCPUs. The instance is provisioned with 256.0 GB of system memory, resulting in a low memory-to-core ratio of 2.0 GB per vCPU. It operates on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

This server type does not include any local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met using external Premium Storage options. Additionally, there are no integrated graphics processing units on this instance, making it unsuitable for hardware-accelerated graphics or GPU-based machine learning workloads.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the D128nls_v6 offers a high density of dedicated compute cores relative to its memory footprint. This low-memory configuration reduces the overall cost compared to standard memory-optimized or general-purpose instances with similar core counts. However, the primary tradeoff is the constrained memory capacity of 2.0 GB per core, which limits its utility for memory-intensive applications.

The D128nls_v6 is designed for compute-bound and network-optimized workloads that require massive parallel processing capabilities but have modest memory requirements. Suitable workloads include high-throughput network appliances, distributed compute nodes, web serving at scale, and parallel batch processing tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure D128nls_v6 is a network-optimized virtual machine from the Dnlv6 family, featuring 128 dedicated vCPUs on an x86_64 Intel processor. Operating under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance is configured with 256.0 GB of system memory, establishing a low memory-to-core ratio of 2.0 GB per vCPU. The server does not include local storage, relying instead on Premium Storage capabilities, and lacks GPU acceleration. This hardware profile offers a cost-efficient option for compute-heavy tasks that do not require large memory allocations. The high core count and network optimization make it suitable for distributed computing, high-throughput network processing, and parallel batch workloads.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D128nls_v6 is a network-optimized virtual machine featuring 128 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 256.0 GB of RAM, and support for Premium Storage without local disk space.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure D128nls_v6 is a network-optimized VM with 128 Intel vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and no local storage, running on Hyper-V.
tagline: A network-optimized, high-core compute instance featuring dedicated Intel processors and a low memory-to-core ratio for parallel workloads.
bullet_points: 128 dedicated Intel vCPUs on x86_64 architecture
256.0 GB of system memory providing 2.0 GB per core
No local storage, requiring external Premium Storage
Optimized for high-throughput network and parallel compute workloads
